name: G.K. Chesterton
title: Author & Apologist
bio: English writer, philosopher, and Christian apologist. Author of the Father Brown mysteries, 'Orthodoxy,' 'The Everlasting Man,' and over 80 books.
faith: Initially an agnostic, Chesterton converted first to Anglicanism and then to Roman Catholicism. His book 'Orthodoxy' describes his intellectual journey to faith. C.S. Lewis credited 'The Everlasting Man' as key to his own conversion.

sources.title: G. K. Chesterton — Wikipedia
sources.note: Comprehensive biography including his conversion journey

sources.title: Orthodoxy
sources.note: By G.K. Chesterton. His autobiographical account of arriving at Christian faith through reason

sources.title: The Everlasting Man
sources.note: By G.K. Chesterton. The book C.S. Lewis credited with helping him toward Christianity

tagline: Found orthodoxy at the end of every road of reason
